name: Not Danny Glover's Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 1 green bell pepper or red bell pepper
2 tomatoes or 1 can (28 oz) diced tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Make vegetable stock by boiling at least one carrot, several bay leaves, and any leftover root vegetables for 45 minutes in 6 cups of water.
2. Add the black-eyed peas and simmer about 30 minutes.
3. Chop the onion, celery, and bell pepper. Remove all the celery leaves from the top of the bunch, rinse well, and chop them too.
4. Sauté the onion in a little oil until translucent.
5. Add the celery and bell pepper to the pan and sauté for a few minutes.
6. Sprinkle generous amounts of spices (oregano, basil, allspice, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper) over the mixture and continue sautéing for another minute.
7. Remove the carrot pieces, vegetable pieces, and bay leaves from the stock.
8. Add the onion mixture and chopped tomatoes to the stock, stirring well. Add more water if necessary.
9. Let simmer about 10 minutes.
10. Chop the okra and stir it into the corn kernels; simmer another 10 minutes.
11. Adjust the spices to taste, then serve with cornbread.
